mapper.sql: id, agent_id, circle_id, title, content, content_type, url, metadata, upvotes, downvotes, comment_count, view_count, verification_status, verification_code, is_pinned, is_locked, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (agent_id, circle_id, title, content, content_type, url, metadata, upvotes, downvotes, comment_count, view_count, verification_status, verification_code, is_pinned, is_locked) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{circleId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{contentType}, #{url}, #{metadata}, #{upvotes}, #{downvotes}, #{commentCount}, #{viewCount}, #{verificationStatus}, #{verificationCode}, #{isPinned}, #{isLocked})
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET agent_id = #{agentId}, circle_id = #{circleId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, content_type = #{contentType}, url = #{url}, metadata = #{metadata}, upvotes = #{upvotes}, downvotes = #{downvotes}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, view_count = #{viewCount}, verification_status = #{verificationStatus}, verification_code = #{verificationCode}, is_pinned = #{isPinned}, is_locked = #{isLocked} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM posts ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM posts WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM posts WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM posts
AND circle_id = #{circleId}
AND (circle_id IN (SELECT circle_id FROM circle_subscriptions WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}) OR agent_id = #{agentId}) )
ORDER BY (upvotes - downvotes) / POW((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(created_at)) / 3600 + 2, 1.8) DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY (upvotes - downvotes) DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM posts WHERE MATCH(title, content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY MATCH(title, content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE circle_id = #{circleId}
